title: Hastewalk Enchantment (Outdated)
description: Ever dreamed of an enchantement that let you walk faster ? Install this mod to fulfill your wish
body:
This mod adds the following enchantment books :
-Hastewalk I --> Gives the speed of the Speed effect
-Hastwalk II Gives the speed of the Speed II effect
-Hastewalk III Gives the speed of the Speed III effect

Each book can be found in enchanting tables
